raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I attempted online to book a flight with XXXX XXXX around trip from XXXX to XXXX XXXX and back. The first trip was priced at {$390.00}. That would include my seats and a round-trip when the confirmation printed out it did not bring me back to XXXX. It only took me to Florida or XXXX XXXX, Florida, I have tried again to book that same flight this time the charge was XXXX when the confirmation printed out is still left me in XXXX Florida it did not bring me back to XXXX. I called XXXX XXXX the next day on the XXXX the agent said no worries he will take care of it he and he booked my flight. It was correct this time, the flight brought me back to XXXX and I also had seats that I chose with the seats and the return flight it was {$430.00} to guaranteed the price. The agent sent me to my phone while he was online a payment portal for me to agree to the {$430.00}. He waited online, I went to the portal with my XXXX XXXX card and I paid the {$430.00} and then twice. I reminded the agent that I needed to be reimbursed for the flights that did not bring me home because somewhere in the process before printing my confirmation, the airline made a mistake, the agent replied, no worries I will take care of it. Several days later I checked and the agent did not take care of it. Ive tried disputing it XXXX XXXX gave me credit and when XXXX XXXX wrote in or challenge my dispute. The {$840.00} was applied back to my card. XXXX XXXX is taking XXXX XXXX word over mine, I have been a faithful card holder since XXXX. Ive never missed a payment and Ive never been late. I am not willing to allow XXXX XXXX  who is presently under federal investigation for overcharging and racketeering to get away with doing me the same way, I cant afford to give XXXX XXXX an additional {$840.00} XXXX XXXX dispute department is clearly not looking at the full evidence. They are not reading the evidence because its clear that I was overcharged. Three transactions in the last transaction is the only one thats valid. I need my money back and I need XXXX XXXX to act on my behalf instead of XXXX XXXX, who is presently under federal investigation for the same behavior.
